summary: PRODUCTION UX FORENSIC AUDIT COMPLETE - Supporting/Admin/Document/Analysis Pages + Platform Demo Pages. All 22 routes audited on https://biqc.thestrategysquad.com. Core pages (business-profile, settings, documents, analysis, sop-generator, competitive-benchmark, marketing-intelligence, exposure-scan) functional with proper form elements, tabs, CTAs. Platform demo pages (login, overview, revenue, alerts, automations, integrations-demo) well-designed with excellent proactive intelligence visualisation. All 5 industry demo pages (msp, construction, consulting, agency, saas) loaded successfully with industry-specific metrics and Executive Memo insights.
test_type: Production UX Forensic Audit - Chunk 2 (Supporting/Admin/Analysis/Demo Pages)

ux_scoring_matrix.score_key: 1-10 scale. 10 = excellent, 7 = good, 4-6 = needs improvement, <4 = critical issue

proactive_intelligence_quality.notes: Excellent proactive insights across all pages. Executive Memo provides plain-language analysis. 'Why it matters' and 'What to do' pattern used consistently. Industry demo pages show exceptional contextual intelligence with specific metrics, thresholds, and recommended actions.

source_clarity.notes: Excellent transparency. Competitive Benchmark shows confidence scores, source types, and 'Why?' accordions. Exposure Scan shows confidence decomposition with component breakdown. Industry pages cite specific data sources and timestamps.

actionability.notes: Outstanding actionability. Every insight leads to clear action. Auto-Email, Quick-SMS, Hand Off buttons throughout. Automations show IF/THEN logic with toggles. Action items are specific (e.g., 'Chase Westfield and Crown' rather than generic 'follow up').

cognitive_load_management.notes: Good use of expandable sections, tabs, and progressive disclosure. Some pages (Competitive Benchmark, Industry views) are information-dense but well-structured. Health strips and attention items prioritise focus areas.

workflow_automation_clarity.notes: Automations page is exemplary - IF/THEN blocks clearly show conditions and actions. Run counts provide confidence. Toggle switches enable quick enable/disable. Auto-follow-up toggles throughout demo pages.

feedback_and_control.notes: Auto-save indicators, loading states, success toasts all present. Tutorial preferences with reset/disable. Calibration status prominent. Settings tabs give user control over AI behaviour.

mental_model_fit.notes: Industry demo pages are exceptional - they speak the language of each vertical (MSP: SLA breach, ticket volume; Construction: progress claims, margin erosion; SaaS: churn cohort, MRR at risk). This is exactly what 2026 cognition platforms should do.

accessibility.notes: Good contrast in dark theme. data-testid attributes present for testing. Some areas could use more explicit ARIA labels. Keyboard navigation not fully tested. Color-coding relies on color alone in some cases (could add icons/patterns).

minor.issue: When no calibration data exists, score gauge shows 'No data' - could add more prominent 'Complete Calibration' CTA in the gauge itself
MONO variable referenced but not imported in component - appears to be using fontFamily.mono instead, minor console warning possible
Color-coding for status indicators (green/amber/red) could benefit from secondary indicators (icons/patterns) for accessibility

action_items: MINOR: Add more prominent calibration CTA in Competitive Benchmark score gauge when no data
MINOR: Consider adding icon patterns alongside color-coding for accessibility
ENHANCEMENT: Consider adding keyboard shortcuts for power users on demo pages

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all 22 routes accessible, forms working, CTAs functional

context_for_next_testing_agent: UX forensic audit of supporting/admin/document/analysis pages plus all platform demo pages complete. All 22 routes audited successfully. Platform meets 2026 cognition-platform expectations with excellent proactive intelligence, source clarity, and actionability. Industry demo pages are particularly strong - they demonstrate best-in-class contextual intelligence for MSP, Construction, Consulting, Agency, and SaaS verticals. Minor accessibility improvements suggested but no critical issues.
